## Why

Describe the problem, motivation, or gap this change addresses.

## What Changed

- Summarize the key code or workflow changes.
- Keep this focused on the material reviewer-visible delta.

## Validation

- List the commands, checks, or manual verification performed.
- Include relevant CI, test, lint, formatting, or runtime validation.

## Risks

- Note any behavioral, dependency, platform, or release risks.
- State `None` if there are no meaningful risks.

## Follow-ups

- Capture intentionally deferred work, if any.
- State `None` if no follow-up work is expected.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to the stated objective.
- [ ] Tests or validation cover the change appropriately.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if behavior or workflow changed.
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or incidental changes are included.
